step_rationale: Oxidized lipid metabolite (oxylipin); reflects lipid oxidative modification in atherogenesis.
mechanism: 9(R)-HODE is an oxidized linoleic acid metabolite reflecting lipid peroxidation and oxidative stress in acute myocardial events.

references.title: Integrated oral microbiome and metabolome analysis unveils key biomarkers and functional pathway alterations in patients with acute myocardial infarction.
references.journal: Frontiers in cellular and infection microbiology
